name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready access to public data via MCP. T04 — US/UK Nonprofits: look up any US nonprofit by EIN (IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS), search by name, or retrieve UK charity registration data (Charity Commission England and Wales). T10 — OSS Vulnerability Intelligence: CVEs per package/version (Google OSV.dev), full dependency graphs (deps.dev), CVE detail with CVSS scores (NIST NVD), CycloneDX/SPDX SBOM auditing, and SPDX licence lookups. All responses are token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown with verified source URLs, fetch timestamps, and SHA-256 integrity hashes. Cache-first, 24-hour TTL. No API key required for T04 or T10.

tools.name: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: Fetch IRS 990 data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns name, address, NTEE code, ruling date, revenue, expenses, and assets in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein('13-1837418'). No API key required.

tools.name: search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Search US nonprofits by organisation name with optional state filter. Returns up to 25 results with EIN, revenue, NTEE code, and address in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS TEOS (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: search_nonprofits_by_name('Red Cross', 'CA'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: Fetch UK registered charity details from the Charity Commission. Returns registration status, income, expenditure, and activities in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: UK Charity Commission (Open Government Licence v3.0). For due diligence and research. Token-efficient. Example: fetch_charity_uk('219099'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Fetch all known CVEs and security advisories for an open-source package version. Returns severity, CVSS score, fixed versions, and affected ranges in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD. Token-efficient. Example: fetch_package_vulnerabilities('requests', '2.28.0', 'PyPI'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Fetch the full transitive dependency graph for a package version. Returns direct and transitive dependencies in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: deps.dev (Google Open Source Insights). Data freshness: 1-hour cache. Hard 8-second timeout — never hangs silently. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Fetch full CVE detail by CVE ID from NIST NVD. Returns description, CVSS base score, severity level, affected products, and patch reference URLs in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NIST NVD (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_cve_detail('CVE-2023-32681'). No API key required.

tools.name: audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Audit a CycloneDX or SPDX Software Bill of Materials against OSV.dev. Call this when a user supplies an SBOM and wants to know which components have known vulnerabilities. Returns per-component vulnerability count, highest severity, and advisory links in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: OSV.dev batch query API (Google). Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_package_licence
tools.description: Fetch the declared software licence for any open source package version. Returns the SPDX licence identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0) in AI-Ready Markdown. Use this before including a dependency in a commercial project to verify licence compatibility. Verified source: deps.dev (Google Open Source Insights). Data freshness: 1-hour cache. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: report_feedback
tools.description: Report a data quality issue with any DataNexus tool response. Call this after receiving a result that appears incorrect, incomplete, or out of date. Parameters: tool_id ('T04' or 'T10'), query_hash (from the tool response), signal (incorrect_data, missing_field, stale_data, not_useful, wrong_entity), comment (optional). Returns {'status': 'recorded'} always. Verified source: DataNexus feedback pipeline. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_mcpize_link
tools.description: Check whether DataNexus tools require a paid subscription and retrieve the upgrade URL if so. Call this when a user asks about pricing, access limits, or subscription status. Returns status='free', status='subscription_required' with upgrade_url, or status='not_configured'. Verified source: DataNexus payment configuration. Token-efficient.

data_sources.name: IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File (EO BMF)
